title: Abandoned Structures
description: 5 new structures, a new block and item to make exploration fun again
body:
- Adds 5 new structures

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Factory, Abandoned Cottage, Shop, Piglin House, And End House

</details>

- Adds new block: Industrial Iron Block crafted from steel ingots and a block of iron
- Adds new item: Steel Ingot, which can be made by smelting an Iron ingot in a furnace
